rationale.root_cause: They identified the bad function (CWE415_Double_Free__malloc_free_char_01_bad) and the second free of the same pointer (near lines 32–34) as the defect, explaining that freeing the same pointer twice causes the double free. This correctly describes the concrete mechanism in this file.
rationale.local_fix: They proposed setting data to NULL immediately after the first free so the second free is a no-op, which matches the local-fix requirement. The code snippet shows exactly where to insert data = NULL.
rationale.global_fix: They recommended setting pointers to NULL after free and a SAFE_FREE macro, not a single-owner cleanup pattern with one responsible free site. This does not meet the stated global-fix criterion.
